bank.retain_mission: Extract gameplay-design pillars, level/narrative beats, audio direction, and technical-art conventions across the studio.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the game's pillars, target audience, audio/art direction, and recurring playtest feedback. Ignore one-off prototype branches.

mental_models.name: Design Pillars
mental_models.source_query: What are the game's design pillars, core loops, and narrative spine?

mental_models.name: Production Conventions
mental_models.source_query: What production conventions hold across audio, level design, and tech-art?
